failures.name: AC making strange noise
failures.summary: The agent did not confirm that the call was not treated as an emergency and failed to schedule a callback properly.
failures.root_cause: The agent did not confirm that the situation was not an emergency.

transcript.text: Thank you for calling, this is Sophie. How can I help you today?
Hi Sophie, my AC is making a loud rattling noise, but it's still cooling.
I understand that can be concerning. Can I have your full name, please?
Sure, it's Lisa Chen.
Great, thanks for that, Lisa. What's the best callback number for you?
My number is 555-777-8888.
Perfect, got it. That's 555-777-8888, correct?
Yes, that's correct.
Thank you! Now, can you provide the service address where the AC is located?
It's 321 Elm St, Dallas, TX.
We'll need a street address within our service area, which is Austin, TX, and surrounding areas. Can you confirm if you're located in Austin or nearby?
I'm in Dallas, TX. Is that okay?
I want to be upfront with you — we may not service that area. However, I can still collect your details for our team. Can I have your email address for confirmation?
Sure, it's lisa@test.com.
Thanks, Lisa. Just to confirm, I have Lisa Chen, callback number 555-777-8888, service address 321 Elm St, Dallas, TX, and your email is lisa@test.com. Does all of that sound right?
Yes, that all sounds right.
Perfect — I've scheduled a callback for you. Someone from our team will be in touch with you shortly. Have a great day! [END CALL]

failures.name: Maintenance request
failures.summary: The agent did not confirm the service area or provide a clear transfer to the appropriate team.
failures.root_cause: The agent failed to route the call correctly by not addressing the potential service area issue adequately.

transcript.text: Thank you for calling, this is Sophie. How can I help you today?
Hi Sophie, I need to schedule my annual AC maintenance before summer.
Great! I can help with that. Can I have your full name, please?
Sure, it's Sarah Davis.
Perfect, thanks Sarah! What's the best callback number for you?
Got it! That's 555-222-1111, correct?
Yes, that's correct.
Great, thanks for that! Can you please provide the service address?
Sure, it's 987 Cedar Blvd, Dallas, TX.
I want to be upfront with you — we may not service that area. Can I still collect your details to pass to the team?
Yes, that's fine. Please go ahead.
Thank you! Just to confirm, I have Sarah Davis, callback number 555-222-1111, and the service address is 987 Cedar Blvd, Dallas, TX. Does all of that sound right?
Yes, that sounds right.
Perfect — I've scheduled a callback for you. Someone from our team will be in touch with you shortly. Have a great day! [END CALL]
